title: Roopanthara
overview: Every worm has an opportunity to transform itself into a colorful butterfly at least once in its lifetime. But the road to transformation	is painful and	full of consequences. Will the worm decide to continue existing as a worm, or will it break its cocoon and finally bloom into a beautiful butterfly, which forms the genesis of Roopanthara?
